function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest 1 invoice linked to your design-partner work.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist passes (attachment was read, single-item order valid, recipient matches canonical entity, YAML subject quoted). Next finalize by deleting the processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task actions complete: processed next inbox message, drafted reply with correct attachment, and deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by drafting an outbound reply email to miles@novak.example with the requested linked invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows before task work, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical metadata, verified sender against canonical entity primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox filename/frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for the oldest 1 invoice linked to design-partner work. Canonical sender identity matched miles@novak.example in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Invoice search and read identified the linked record 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md (issued_on 2026-02-08). An outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox with that exact attachment, then the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.

score_detail: markdown frontmatter mismatch in '60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md': attachments[0]: expected "50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md" got "50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md"
